cfg.seoTitle: VSBN Group | Chennai's Leading Real Estate Developer
cfg.seoDesc: Affordable plots and villas for sale in Chennai , Tambaram & Chengalpattu. DTCP approved projects with bank loan support. Discover premium townships by VSBN Group.
cfg.heroSubtitle: VSBN Group delivers premium gated community plots and villas across Chennai with 26+ years of experience, 250+ successful projects, and complete real estate consulting including architecture, interiors, documentation, and bank loan assistance.
cfg.about1: Established in 1997 by Mr. T. Balamurugan, VSBN Group has grown to become a beacon of trust in Chennai.
cfg.about2: We focus on high-growth corridors, delivering Govt approved projects with 100% clear titles.VSBN Group offers affordable DTCP / RERA / CMDA approved plots and villas in Chennai, Tambaram & Chengalpattu with bank loan support up to 85%. Trusted developer since 1997.
cfg.address: NO:1, Rajarathinam street, near by VIDHYA THEATRE, West Tambaram, Chennai, Tamil Nadu - 600045
cfg.mdQuote: "Our aim is not just to build properties, but to craft vibrant communities where families can thrive and legacies are born."

cfg.spinnerClaimNote: *We will notify you via call regarding your gift.
cfg.spinnerLossText: Better luck next time. Don't worry, there are always more chances ahead!
cfg.spinnerSuccessText: Your details have been securely registered to our backend. Our team will contact you shortly.

faqs.a: Yes, all our plots and villa projects are fully DTCP approved with 100% clear documentation.
We have exclusive tie-ups with major nationalized banks including SBI, HDFC, and Every eligibale Banks for seamless loan processing.

reviews.name: Aishwarya
reviews.text:
I am a purchaser of land from VSBN Group, Vijaya Green City, Nellikuppam. Consider it a worthy purchase. They are a reliable Land Promoter. 

I take this opportunity to thank them especially Srinivasan and Yashwanth. They coordinated and supported in every stage from site visit to registration. 

Wish them all success in their new venture in future. 

ALL THE BEST

reviews.name: Ramesh K.
reviews.text: Excellent transparency. Bought a villa and the entire process was seamless.

reviews.name: Priya S.
reviews.text: Highly recommend VSBN Group. They deliver exactly what they promise on time.

Terms & Conditions

Terms and conditions varies on spin gifts , booking refunds & Purchases , Kindly Contact our Customer service or the agent for detailed Information .
cfg.privacyContent:
Privacy Policy

Our Collection of data is used in company only , we don't share our customer data to any other 3rd parties.
